violation_details: Large roach presence. Roaches crawling on pans, in microwave, on lights and walls. Permit suspended.
source: Mecklenburg County Health Department / Charlotte Observer
notes: Restaurant was shut down by health department.

restaurant_name: Masti Indian Restaurant and Bar (formerly Pudina)
violation_details: 22 violations: Dead cockroaches behind dishwasher, cockroach droppings throughout kitchen walls, fruit flies in onions, cigarettes above food prep area, food build-up in coolers and microwave, dirty cloth with excessive food debris contacting prepared food.
notes: One of the worst Indian restaurant inspection scores in Charlotte.

restaurant_name: Masti Indian Restaurant and Bar (formerly Pudina)
violation_details: Multiple cockroaches of various sizes found. Roach found in rice.
source: Mecklenburg County Health Department / Charlotte Alerts News

violation_details: B grade inspection. Specific violations not yet retrieved.
notes: South Charlotte Indian restaurant receiving B grade.

violation_details: No Certified Food Protection Manager on site. Half wall across from prep top needed cleaning. Floors needed cleaning under and around equipment.
No major violations noted in available records.
